title: microcos dulitensis
intro: Microcos dulitensis, a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, is also known as the "tungkol" or "Malayan mallow". It is a plant that has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microcos dulitensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves, roots, and stems are used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
